description: Style Note This KXIP men's jersey is sure to grab eyeballs and you'll feel a sense of true team spirit when you wear this! Feel the blood pumping through your veins as you cheer your team on. There's no better way of saying "Go Kings" than with this reebok jersey!Product Details Red and silver jersey, has spread collar with V- neckline , short sleeves, branding on right chest and Punjab Kings logo on left chestMaterial and Care PolyesterMachine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logoDry in shadeWarm ironSize and Fit Regular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders
